title: FurryCraft
description: Add a unique mob — the furry — along with new resources, materials, tools, and armor! Explore new ores and craft powerful gear to become even stronger.
body:
Add a unique mob — the furry — along with new resources, materials, tools, and armor! Explore new ores and craft powerful gear to become even stronger. This mod expands your gameplay by introducing unique creatures and items inspired by furry culture. Perfect for those seeking new challenges and opportunities in Minecraft!
Added a new type of armor that is made from a new material called "Furry gem." This material can be found underground, just like diamonds and iron. It can also be used to create a new type of tool.
A new mob has been added that will appear in your world. This mob will be neutral towards the player, but if the player hits the mob, the mob will defend itself.
This is my first modification that I did myself, so don't judge me too harshly.
